symbols.name: Currency
symbols.summary: Represents a currency with various predefined currency instances.

symbols.name: implicit operator Currency(string)
symbols.summary: Provides implementations for various operators.

syntax.content: public static implicit operator Currency(string value)

symbols.name: implicit operator string(Currency)
symbols.summary: Applies a specified mathematical operation to two given Complex numbers and returns the result.

syntax.content: public static implicit operator string(Currency value)

symbols.name: Create(string)
symbols.summary: Creates a new Currency instance based on the provided currency code.

parameters.description: The currency code to create the Currency instance for.
The currency code to create the Currency instance for.

symbols.name: ToString()
symbols.summary: Returns the string representation of the Currency Code's symbol.

returns.description: The symbol corresponding to the Currency Code.
The symbol corresponding to the Currency Code.

symbols.name: GetAtomicValues()
symbols.summary: Retrieves the atomic values that represent this instance.
